title: push.rs/inbox.rs: fire-and-forget spawns lack error tracing context
description: Files: src/inbox.rs:632-639, 909-917, 970-978, 1234-1243, 1288-1297; src/posting.rs:1058-1067, 1774-1784, 1979-1989. All push notification spawns clone pool and a single string, then call send_push_notification in a detached task. If the task panics (e.g. due to the unwrap in encrypt_payload's Aes128Gcm::new_from_slice), there is no JoinHandle to observe it. Consider using tokio::spawn with a .instrument(tracing::Span) or at minimum catch_unwind inside the task.
